{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output identifies a few prior works but doesn't delve into sharp distinctions or comparative analysis.",
    "R1.7": "There are likely missing citations in the text, particularly regarding specific techniques and related work on multi-agent systems.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty or potential limitations.",
    "RX.3": "The output does not demonstrate a clear understanding of the exact tasks requested. It might cover a different set of tasks than intended.",
    "RX.4": "No obvious harmful content is introduced, but there's a possibility of regressions in accuracy or completeness compared to existing methods.",
    "RX.5": "The output lacks traceability for any modifications made to the original text. It's unclear how the agent arrived at its suggestions."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output identifies a few prior works but doesn't delve into sharp distinctions or comparative analysis.
rationale.R1.7: There are likely missing citations in the text, particularly regarding specific techniques and related work on multi-agent systems.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty or potential limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output does not demonstrate a clear understanding of the exact tasks requested. It might cover a different set of tasks than intended.
rationale.RX.4: No obvious harmful content is introduced, but there's a possibility of regressions in accuracy or completeness compared to existing methods.
rationale.RX.5: The output lacks traceability for any modifications made to the original text. It's unclear how the agent arrived at its suggestions.
